personal.tagline: I build resilient infrastructure, automate everything in sight, and keep systems running while I sleep.

bio: I'm a DevOps Engineer passionate about bridging the gap between development and operations. My world revolves around cloud infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and making deployments boring (the good kind).

I believe infrastructure should be declarative, reproducible, and invisible — it should just work. I spend my days wrangling Kubernetes clusters, designing resilient architectures, and automating away the tedious stuff so teams can focus on shipping value.
When I'm not in a terminal, you'll find me experimenting with new tech, contributing to open source, exploring the outdoors, or hunting down the perfect espresso.

interests.title: Cloud & Infrastructure
interests.description: Designing scalable, cost-effective cloud architectures. Multi-cloud strategies and edge computing fascinate me.

interests.title: Automation
interests.description: If I do it twice, I script it. GitOps, ChatOps, self-healing systems — automating everything is my superpower.

interests.title: Security & SRE
interests.description: Building secure-by-default systems. Observability, incident response, and blameless postmortems.

interests.title: Travel & Outdoors
interests.description: Hiking mountain trails, exploring new cities, and finding the best local food spots wherever I go.

interests.title: Music
interests.description: From classic rock to lo-fi beats for coding sessions. Always building the perfect playlist.

interests.title: Continuous Learning
interests.description: Currently diving deeper into Rust, distributed systems, and platform engineering patterns.

contact.message: I'm always open to interesting conversations, collaboration opportunities, or just geeking out about infrastructure. Feel free to reach out.
